metadata.description: Marketplace for the Engineering OS plugin — a universal, domain-agnostic AI engineering organization for any software product, on any stack.

plugins.name: engineering-os
plugins.description: A universal AI engineering organization delivered as a Claude Code plugin (Codex-compatible via AGENTS.md). A fixed roster of engineering roles (Engineering Advisor, Architect, Backend/Frontend/Mobile/AI-ML engineers, Data Engineer, ML Platform Engineer, Security, QA, Platform/SRE, Delivery Coordinator) drives any requirement from intake to release through a staged, lane-scaled, VETO-gated pipeline, grounded in a per-adoption Product Canon. Stack- and domain-agnostic.
